# Drawer

A side panel drawer component that slides in from the edge of the screen for supplementary content or navigation.

## Import

```jsx
import { Drawer } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

All sub-components are accessed as properties of the main `Drawer` component:

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `Drawer` | The root component that manages drawer state. |
| `Drawer.Trigger` | The element that opens the drawer on click. |
| `Drawer.Content` | The drawer panel containing all content. |
| `Drawer.Header` | The header section of the drawer. |
| `Drawer.Body` | The main scrollable content area. |
| `Drawer.Footer` | The footer section, typically for action buttons. |
| `Drawer.Title` | The title of the drawer. |
| `Drawer.Description` | A description or subtitle for the drawer. |
| `Drawer.CloseTrigger` | A button that closes the drawer. |
| `Drawer.ActionTrigger` | A button that performs an action and closes the drawer. |

## Props

### Drawer

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `open` | `boolean` | - | Controlled open state of the drawer. |
| `onOpenChange` | `(details: { open: boolean }) => void` | - | Callback when the open state changes. |
| `placement` | `"start" \| "end" \| "top" \| "bottom"` | `"end"` | The side from which the drawer slides in. |
| `size` | `"xs" \| "sm" \| "md" \| "lg" \| "xl" \| "full"` | `"md"` | The width (or height for top/bottom) of the drawer. |

## Usage

### Basic Drawer

```jsx
<Drawer>
  <Drawer.Trigger asChild>
    <Button>Open Drawer</Button>
  </Drawer.Trigger>
  <Drawer.Content>
    <Drawer.Header>
      <Drawer.Title>Drawer Title</Drawer.Title>
      <Drawer.Description>Drawer description text.</Drawer.Description>
    </Drawer.Header>
    <Drawer.Body>
      <p>Drawer body content goes here.</p>
    </Drawer.Body>
    <Drawer.Footer>
      <Drawer.CloseTrigger asChild>
        <Button variant="outline">Cancel</Button>
      </Drawer.CloseTrigger>
      <Drawer.ActionTrigger asChild>
        <Button>Save</Button>
      </Drawer.ActionTrigger>
    </Drawer.Footer>
  </Drawer.Content>
</Drawer>
```

### Drawer from Left Side

```jsx
<Drawer placement="start">
  <Drawer.Trigger asChild>
    <Button>Open Left Drawer</Button>
  </Drawer.Trigger>
  <Drawer.Content>
    <Drawer.Header>
      <Drawer.Title>Navigation</Drawer.Title>
    </Drawer.Header>
    <Drawer.Body>
      <nav>Navigation links here</nav>
    </Drawer.Body>
  </Drawer.Content>
</Drawer>
```

### Controlled Drawer

```jsx
function ControlledDrawer() {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);

  return (
    <>
      <Button onClick={() => setOpen(true)}>Open</Button>
      <Drawer open={open} onOpenChange={(e) => setOpen(e.open)}>
        <Drawer.Content>
          <Drawer.Header>
            <Drawer.Title>Settings</Drawer.Title>
          </Drawer.Header>
          <Drawer.Body>
            <p>Settings content here.</p>
          </Drawer.Body>
          <Drawer.Footer>
            <Drawer.CloseTrigger asChild>
              <Button>Close</Button>
            </Drawer.CloseTrigger>
          </Drawer.Footer>
        </Drawer.Content>
      </Drawer>
    </>
  );
}
```
